things.name: Copan Ruins
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Maya city with the world's finest carved stelae and hieroglyphic staircase

things.name: Valle de Angeles Craft Village
things.description: Colonial silver-mining town 22km away with the best Honduran handicrafts

things.name: National Museum of Honduras
things.description: Pre-Columbian artefacts from Copan and the Maya Lenca culture of Honduras

things.name: La Tigra Cloud Forest
things.description: Quetzal-rich cloud forest national park 22km from the capital

things.name: Parque La Leona
things.description: Hilltop park with the best panoramic views over Tegucigalpa

things.name: Virgen de Suyapa Basilica
things.description: Honduras's most important Catholic pilgrimage church with a tiny miraculous statue

things.name: Central Park & Cathedral
things.description: Colonial heart of the city with the 18th-century baroque cathedral

things.name: Bay Islands Diving (Roatan)
things.description: World-class diving on Belize Barrier Reef system 1-hour flight to Roatan

things.name: Mercado San Isidro
things.description: Honduras's largest traditional market with Lenca pottery, hammocks and street food

things.name: Baleada
things.description: Honduras's national street food - flour tortilla with refried beans, cream and cheese
